recommendations.title: Downrange
recommendations.overview: Stranded at the side of the road after a tire blowout, a group of friends become targets for an enigmatic sniper.

recommendations.title: Black Mirror: Bandersnatch
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Mystery, Drama, Horror, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a young programmer begins to question reality as he adapts a dark fantasy novel into a video game. A mind-bending tale with multiple endings.

recommendations.title: Critters 2
recommendations.overview: Three bounty hunters from space fly back to the town of Grovers Bend, hoping to save local residents from a new batch of Critter eggs.

recommendations.title: No One Lives
recommendations.overview: A gang of ruthless highway killers kidnap a wealthy couple traveling cross country only to shockingly discover that things are not what they seem.

recommendations.title: Psycho IV: The Beginning
recommendations.overview: When he hears talk radio host Fran Ambrose discussing the topic of matricide, Norman calls in under a false name to tell his story.

recommendations.title: Desperation
recommendations.overview: When a sheriff arrests a writer, a family, a couple, and a hitchiker and throws them in a jail cell in the deserted town of Desperation, they must fight for their lives.

recommendations.title: The Howling
recommendations.overview: After a bizarre and near fatal encounter with a serial killer, a newswoman is sent to a rehabilitation center whose inhabitants may not be what they seem.

recommendations.title: Dark Harvest
recommendations.overview: In a small Midwestern town, a deadly annual ritual unfolds when the mythical nightmare, Sawtooth Jack, rises from the cornfields and challenges the town’s teenage boys in a bloody battle of survival.

recommendations.title: Piranha
recommendations.overview: When flesh-eating piranhas are accidentally released into a summer resort's rivers, the guests become their next meal.

recommendations.title: Gremlins
recommendations.overview: After receiving an exotic small animal as a Christmas gift, a young man inadvertently breaks three important rules concerning his new pet, which unleashes a horde of malevolently mischievous creatures on a small town.
